name: chr13p_acrocentric_short_arm
description: Chromosome 13 short arm (13p), an acrocentric short arm composed of (proximal to distal) alpha-satellite, beta-satellite, 45S rDNA NOR, gamma-satellite-like sequences and subtelomeric repeats. Mostly unassembled in GRCh38; resolved in T2T-CHM13.

architecture.internal_structure: Centromeric alpha-satellite (D13Z1) -> beta-satellite arrays -> 45S rDNA NOR (~30-50 repeat units) -> distal heterochromatic stalk; nearly identical p-arm architecture shared with chr14, 15, 21, 22.
